---
title: "tpe-vignette"
author: "Florian Larue"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{tpe-vignette}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include=TRUE}
library(CGMTPE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = rprojroot::find_rstudio_root_file())
```

```{r}
# load example data
loadData()

# create a TPE analysis object
TPE_analysis <- createTpe(varieties=c("Fadda"),
                 environments=c("BAMA2014S1"),
                 parameters=param)

# set weather data and observation data from the data loaded with loadData()
TPE_analysis$set_weather(weather)
TPE_analysis$set_obs(obs)

# run parameter estimation, will also update the parameters of the TPE a object
TPE_analysis$runEstimation(maxiter=3, paramnames=paramOfInterest)

# create a simulation grid
TPE_analysis$createGrid("grid1", 5, 2, 2, -4.3, 11.8)

# generate climate on each point of the grid
TPE_analysis$genClim(gridID=1, path="D:\\Marksim\\")

# run model simulation on each point of the grid using estimated parameters
TPE_analysis$runGridSim(gridID=1)

# plot simulations
#TPE_analysis$plotSim("GrainYieldPopFin")
plot(TPE_analysis$grids[[1]]$gridPoints[1,1][[1]]$result$Lai, type="l") #TMP

```
